name: warning-context-saturation
description: Large Anthropic model context: input at 65% of context window, combined saturation at 85% (bucket=95). Warning band from length+context without any ambiguity.

input.prompt: Run an analysis on all provided records and return the results.

notes: Length 130000/200000=0.65 → bucket=60. Context (170000/200000)=0.85 → bucket=95. Structural=100. Score=55.
